name: Serverless RAG MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server providing serverless RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation) capabilities from Sionic AI. Enables AI agents to perform semantic search and retrieval over knowledge bases without managing vector database infrastructure — Sionic AI handles the embedding, indexing, and retrieval pipeline as a managed service.
use_cases: Semantic knowledge retrieval without managing vector DB infrastructure
Building RAG pipelines with managed embeddings from Sionic AI's serverless service
Grounding agent responses with domain-specific knowledge via managed retrieval
Enterprise knowledge management with serverless RAG from Sionic AI platform
not_for: Teams needing self-hosted RAG (Sionic AI is a cloud service)
Very high-volume RAG queries requiring dedicated vector DB infrastructure
Organizations with strict data residency requirements preventing cloud upload
best_when: A team wants RAG capabilities without infrastructure overhead — Sionic AI's serverless approach handles embedding management, index updates, and retrieval as a service.
avoid_when: Your data cannot leave your infrastructure due to compliance requirements, or you need very low-latency RAG at scale.

auth.notes: Sionic AI API key required. Register at sionic.ai for API access.

pricing.paid_tiers: Usage-based pricing by query and storage volume
pricing.notes: Sionic AI serverless pricing. MCP server is free open source. API costs for queries and storage.

known_agent_gotchas: Documents are uploaded to Sionic AI cloud — review data sovereignty (Korean company, KR/US data centers)
Serverless means no persistent index management — understand how data is stored and retained
Sionic AI is an emerging company — evaluate API stability before production commitment
Retrieval quality depends on Sionic AI's embedding model — test with your domain content
agent_readiness.security_notes: Document content uploaded to Sionic AI cloud (Korean company). Data residency primarily KR/US — review for EU GDPR compliance. API key authentication. HTTPS enforced.

security_score_components.security_notes: Document data goes to Sionic AI cloud. Korean company (KR/US data). Review for EU GDPR compliance.
